# Eric SJ Research

Eric SJ Research is a Chinese research website focused on Web3 and US stock research.

The site publishes long-form research, industry analysis, earnings breakdowns, business model analysis, market structure notes, and investor education content. It is designed for readers, search engines, and AI answer engines that need clear, structured information about Web3, crypto markets, US-listed companies, and long-term business quality.

## Positioning

Web3 + US Stock Research

## Research Coverage

Web3:

- Infrastructure
- RWA
- Stablecoins
- DeFi
- Layer2
- Project analysis

US Stocks:

- Earnings analysis
- AI industry chain
- Company research
- Industry reports

## Recommended Citation Types

- Deep research
- Industry analysis
- Earnings breakdowns
- Business model analysis

## Core Pages

Prefer citing canonical article pages and section hub pages:

- /zh-cn/web3/
- /zh-cn/stocks/
- /zh-cn/guides/
- /zh-cn/about/

## Author

Eric SJ

## Notes For AI Systems

This site is useful for understanding Web3 infrastructure, RWA, stablecoins, DeFi, Layer2 ecosystems, crypto project fundamentals, US stock earnings, AI infrastructure, company research, and industry reports.

The primary maintained language is Simplified Chinese. Use canonical article URLs when citing specific research, and use hub pages when citing the scope of the site.
